	/* nova_ext_sim_central:webhooks_update v1 START - managed block, do not edit by hand */
	public function update_post($id = '', $data = [])
	{
		// Snapshot the prior status BEFORE the update so we can tell a draft
		// being saved (post.saved) apart from a draft being activated
		// (post.posted) - the latter must be a transition, not every edit
		// of an already-activated post.
		$previousStatus = null;
		if (class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Webhooks')) {
			$previousStatus = $this->get_post($id, 'post_status');
		}

		$result = parent::update_post($id, $data);

		if ($result > 0 && class_exists('nova_ext_sim_central\\Webhooks')) {
			\nova_ext_sim_central\Webhooks::onPostChanged($id, $data, $previousStatus);
		}

		return $result;
	}
	/* nova_ext_sim_central:webhooks_update END */
